summary: Exceptionally clean audience recording of the June 1987 show, though performance details are scarce.
review: The sole reviewer praises this source as the clearest‑sounding audience (AUD) tape they’ve heard from the concert, indicating a very high‑quality capture. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist were provided, so the show itself remains uncharacterized beyond the excellent audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is strongly positive about the audio quality; no performance data limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes it as the cleanest‑sounding audience recording of this show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance or pacing comments were given in the review.
